info.name: Arcjet Decide API
info.description: SDK-first security-as-code platform. The production interface is the Connect/gRPC Decide service (proto.decide.v1alpha1.DecideService) at decide.arcjet.com. ConnectRPC supports gRPC over HTTP/2 and an HTTP/1.1 + JSON POST fallback to the same RPC paths, modeled here. The Arcjet SDK is the supported interface; these requests are for reference.

info.name: Make a security decision for a request.

items.docs: Connect RPC Decide method. The SDK sends request details and configured rules; the service returns a decision (ALLOW, DENY, CHALLENGE, ERROR). Native transport is gRPC over HTTP/2; the HTTP/1.1 + JSON POST equivalent is shown.

info.name: Report a decision made locally by the SDK.

items.docs: Connect RPC Report method. When the SDK reaches a decision locally in its WebAssembly module, it asynchronously reports that decision to Arcjet for dashboard visibility and state.
